message:
feat(policy,supply-chain,security): refine hardening clamps, idempotency store, decision receipts, and supply chain modules

- policy/hardening_clamps.rs: expand hardening clamp logic
- remote/idempotency_store.rs: refine store operations
- security/decision_receipt.rs: extend decision receipt handling
- supply_chain/category_shift.rs: refine category shift logic
- supply_chain/transparency_verifier.rs: extend verifier
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
